Off Calendar Sep-01-2017 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Michael Smith, Esq. (510-267-7261) of Carbone Smoke Smith Bent & Leonard for Defendant Jae Woo Kim through Court Call.
No other Appearance.

RULING - The matter is Uncontested.The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF OLEG MOROZOV's Motion For Sanctions (CC9 section 575.2 et. seq; LRSF 1.1. and LRSF 5.0)

Plaintiff Oleg Morozov's motion for sanctions is denied. Neither defendant nor defendant's attorney or carrier committed any sanctionable conduct. Order is signed. (see scanned order for details) Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. =(302/HK)
